title: Racosperma cataractae

The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of various conditions such as digestive issues and skin problems. The bioactive constituents of Racosperma cataractae include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
